assertions.text: [rubric-1] Includes a "what exists" section identifying current code
assertions.evidence: Section 1, 'What Exists Today', provides a detailed breakdown of current models, services, utilities, and entry points.

assertions.text: [rubric-2] Includes a "what needs to change" section
assertions.evidence: Section 2, 'What Needs to Change for Issue #50', identifies specific modifications needed in the schema, logic, and presentation layers.

assertions.text: [rubric-3] Lists all consumers of affected interfaces
assertions.evidence: Section 3, 'Consumers / Blast Radius', explicitly lists the CLI, API, and reports as consumers of the affected interfaces.

assertions.text: [rubric-4] Identifies risks (backward compatibility, multiple entry points)
assertions.evidence: Section 5, 'Risks / Considerations', discusses backward compatibility (API Contract Break) and the impact of changes across multiple shared entry points.
